title: 超能陆战队
quote: There are no limits to what you can achieve.
translation: 你能取得的成就，是不可限量的。

title: 疯狂动物城
quote: Ready to make the world a better place?
translation: 准备好让世界变得更美好了吗？

title: 当幸福来敲门
quote: Don't ever let somebody tell you you can't do something.
translation: 永远不要让别人告诉你，你成不了大器。

title: 爱乐之城
quote: Here's to the ones who dream, foolish as they may seem.
translation: 致那些追梦的人，哪怕他们看起来有多傻。

title: 寻梦环游记
quote: The real death is that no one remembers you.
translation: 真正的死亡，是世界上没有一个人记得你。

title: 死亡诗社
quote: Seize the day. Make your lives extraordinary.
translation: 抓住每一天，让你的生命变得非凡。

title: 魔女宅急便
quote: We need to find our own inspiration. Sometimes it's not easy.
translation: 我们必须寻找自己的灵感，有时候这并不容易。

title: 狮子王
quote: The past can hurt. But the way I see it, you can either run from it, or learn from it.
translation: 过去也许会让人受伤。但在我看来，你要么逃避它，要么从中学习。
